final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing the GPT-5.5 launch, with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a high-end China domestic roadshow / GP pitch deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 16:9 slide cover layout with clear title hierarchy, presenter name, and event branding
Subject: must include:
  - GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the central theme
  - Sam Altman (奥特曼) as the named presenter
  - China domestic fundraising roadshow (路演) context
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance stage backdrop — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, high-stakes investment atmosphere — exact light and mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with GP / institutional investor pitch deck conventions — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (large, primary headline), "奥特曼" (presenter name), "路演" or roadshow context label as secondary text
Constraints: must follow China domestic GP roadshow slide conventions — clean, credible, institutional; layout must read as a real pitch deck cover
Avoid: must avoid overly casual or consumer-app aesthetics; avoid cluttered layouts
